name: batch-agent-vllm-a100-80gb
startScript: set -euo pipefail; if [ ! -d /workspace/parallel-agents ]; then git clone https://github.com/your-org/parallel-agents.git /workspace/parallel-agents; fi; bash /workspace/parallel-agents/deploy/vllm_server.sh
readme: Starts vLLM on one A100 80GB with prefix caching enabled and Batch Agent patch helpers importable. Exposes OpenAI-compatible API on port 8000.
